data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of social sharing with pre-written messages. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions social sharing but lacks specific details or evidence that pre-written messages are utilized, leading to a clear gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of social sharing functionality with pre-written messages.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify social sharing with pre-written messages
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the API allows sharing with pre-written messages.
